program.name: Master of Science in Information Technology

course_type_legend.O: Obligatory / mandatory. Must be included in degree

program.specialisation_source_note: Specialisation memberships are assigned from the profile sections in LiU Studieinfo 6CITE/6292. A course can belong to multiple profiles. Courses outside the profile sections have specialisation null.
